text: "But all my races are very close to VO2max, relying almost exclusively on Carbohydrate. Why should I care about 'fat burning'?"  A very common misunderstanding is the thought that VO2max is the top of the intensity pyramid.   Your VO2max - your maximal Oxygen Uptake is the sum of
